title: funcy's explosions physics
description: 💥A simple plugin that adds physics to minecraft's explosions! 💥
body:
![HomeLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a14def2d069ae6f02cf46d01d4070048616a747.png)

Add physics to minecraft's explosions with changeable settings! 

**⚠️NOTE⚠️** ```Initializing Legacy Material Support. Unless you have legacy plugins and/or data this is a bug!``` PLEASE IGNORE AND THIS WILL HAPPEN EVERYTIME YOU START THE SERVER AND AN EXPLOSION STARTS!

I would appreciate if you support me for my hard work by [donating](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/funcybeardev) any amount 💖💖

# Showcase:

![tnt bomb](https://i.imgur.com/aA6qA9h.gif)![tnt-in-nether](https://i.imgur.com/0cgR2qb.gif)

# Features:

- Change X, Y, Z velocity of the blocks
- If the server TPS goes less than 15 (changeable in the config) physics will not work!
